name: Rustad School Bus Inc
officers: Jean Rustad (Vice President, Rustad family operations)
registry_source: MN Secretary of State portal returned system error; could not confirm exact file number/status via SOS. Family business operating since 1947 per Rustad Tours/D&B; Rustad Bus Service Inc formed in 1981 per D&B/aggregator data. notes: USDOT 2513304 chosen as best match for input name 'Rustad School Bus Inc' - exact legal name match, same address (208 N 12th St, Kerkhoven). Sister/related entity USDOT 177826 = RUSTAD BUS SERVICE INCORPORATED (MC-147310, interstate authority, 6 power units, 15 drivers, Satisfactory rating 09/22/2025) covers tours/charter side at same address. MCS-150 for 2513304 last filed 02/24/2026. Family-owned bus operation est. 1947.
